firmware.title: Version update v14.8.4576
firmware.description:
Release Notes – SW v14.8.4576

1. Google Security Patch update for enhanced security and privacy

2. Improved DVB-T2/S2 Nokia dongle performance

3. General bug fixes and performance improvements Note:

During installation, the TV screen may temporarily go black with no information displayed.

Please ensure the device remains connected to the power supply and do not disconnect it until the Home screen reappears, and the update is complete.
